metadata.title: States PCS: Odisha GK & General Studies for OPSC and other Odisha Exams

questions.question: Silver Filigree Craft is very famous in which of the following district of Odisha?
questions.explanation: More than 90% of silver is used in Silver Filigree Craft. It is very famous in the Cuttack district of Odisha.

questions.question: The use of art in music is the characteristic of which of the following classes of Odissi music?
questions.explanation: The use of art in music is the characteristic of Chitrakala. Some evidence of Chitrakala is found in the lyrics written by the famous Odia poet Baladeva Rath.

questions.question: What is the name of the Odia poet who is credited for the creation of Dhumpa Sangita?
questions.explanation: Dhumpa is a cylindrical hollow instrument that is made of Bamboo. Baladeva Ratha is credited for the creation of Dhumpa Sangita.

questions.question: Which of the following dance of Odisha is related to the worshipping of Lord Shiva?
questions.explanation: Daskathia dance is related to the worshipping of Lord Shiva. The performers represent different versions of Lord Shiva like Rudra, Shankar, Mahadeva, Hara.

questions.question: What is the name of the first modern school in Odisha?
questions.explanation: The name of the first modern school in Odisha is Cuttack Zilla School. It was set up in 1866 AD.

questions.question: The Biju Patnaik University of Technology is situated in which of the following places of Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Biju Patnaik University of Technology is situated in Rourkela (Sundargarh district). It was set up in 2002.

questions.question: Which of the following districts of Odisha has the highest no of ST population?
questions.explanation: Scheduled Tribes are considered as the indigenous people of Odisha. Malkangiri districts of Odisha has the highest no of ST population.

questions.question: As per the census 2011, what is the population density of Odisha?
questions.explanation: The population density of Odisha is 270 as per the census 2011. In the year 2001, it was 236.

questions.question: Which of the following districts of Odisha has the lowest sex ratio as per census 2011?
questions.explanation: Nayagarh district has the lowest sex ratio (915) as per census 2011. Rayagada district has the highest sex ratio.

questions.question: As per the census 2011, which district of Odisha has the lowest literacy rate?
questions.explanation: As per the census 2011, Nabarangpur district has the lowest literacy rate (46.43%). Khordha district has the highest literacy rate.
